name: Brian Lehrer
abstract: Brian Lehrer (born October 5, 1952) is an American radio talk show host on New York City's public radio station WNYC. His daily two-hour 2007 Peabody Award-winning program, The Brian Lehrer Show, features interviews with newsmakers and experts about current events and social issues.

about_quotes.speaker: Arthur Baron
about_quotes.evidence: I heard, you know a great show to listen to you, you won’t get it in the air but online you can get on WNYC public radio down in New York, 10 to 12 every weekday, Brian Lehrer, he has an amazing call-in show
about_quotes.doc_title: Arthur Baron interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, June 3, 2020 [interview 2 of 2]
